message:
perf: parallelize fragment metadata loading in loadDatasetFromR2 + loadParquetFragments

Both methods loaded fragment metadata sequentially (head + get + readColumnMeta
per fragment). For a dataset with N fragments, this was 3N+ serial R2 round-trips.
Now uses Promise.all with per-fragment try/catch — a single fragment failure
logs a warning and skips it instead of aborting the entire dataset load.

loadParquetFragments (Iceberg path) gets the same treatment.
